description: Yggdrasil Ed25519 address mapping test vectors. SHA-512(pubkey)[0:8] with 0x02 prefix bit selection. Rust lichen-core::addr::NodeId::ygg_addr_from_pubkey and C lichen_eui_from_ed25519 must match.

vectors.name: test-vector-0
